reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 30-Night Eastern Caribbean Escape and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 30-Night Eastern Caribbean Escape and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Eastern Caribbean Escape and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Eastern Caribbean Escape | Odyssey of the Seas | Royal Caribbean International
seo.metaDescription: Book a 30-night Caribbean cruise onboard Odyssey of the Seas of Royal Caribbean International. Visiting Fort Lauderdale, San Juan, St. Thomas. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
